meaning: n.金银丝细工,易损之物adj.饰有金银丝细工的
examples: In the fourth row a chrysolite, an onyx and a jasper. Mount them in gold filigree Settings.
Amongst the jewellery recovered is a gold and platinum filigree ring with over 75 gemstones.
The decoration techniques used by the artisans to apply gemstones and pearls were filigree and enameling.
The garish filigree of the gonzo director, Terry Gilliam, surrounds this fable of redemption with pseudo-originality.
The accessories were something to see as well, especially the laser cut leather filigree bags that cleverly worked in the RL logo and the minaudieres shaped like fans.
